subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant, my pure servitude in all things is unto His Ancient Beauty - raise thou the cry of servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا منادی میثاق عبودیتی المحضه فی جمیع الشئون لجماله القدیم بانگ بانگ بندگی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
